description: Authoritative IMO ship particulars on the command line, plus a local cache that turns one-shot lookups into a compounding vessel index.

novel_features.name: Batch IMO lookup with throttled persistence
novel_features.description: Resolve a list of IMOs in one invocation, honoring the 1 req/2-3s throttle and persisting each to the local cache.

novel_features.name: Local cache browse with FTS
novel_features.description: Browse vessels you have already fetched, with filters on flag/owner/type and full-text search on name/owner.

novel_features.name: Watchlist with selective refresh
novel_features.description: Pin vessels for an active deal or story, then refresh only the pinned ones at a chosen cadence.

novel_features.name: Cross-snapshot ship history (flag-hop detector)
novel_features.description: Show how a vessel's particulars have changed across snapshots — flag, name, owner, operator, classification society, status.

novel_features.name: Stale-cache report
novel_features.description: List cached vessels whose particulars haven't been refreshed in N days.

novel_features.name: Owner-fleet listing from accumulated cache
novel_features.description: List every cached vessel for a given owner string (the Companies module isn't in v1).

novel_features.name: Session liveness ping
novel_features.description: Single fast GET to /Public/SHIPS/Default.aspx; exits 0 if session is live, non-zero if re-login needed.
